attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT ORDER_NUMBER, QUOTE_NUMBER, PSG, PRODUCT_ID, PRODUCT_KEY, SK_INSTANCE_ID_INT, SERIAL_NUMBER,QUOTE_NET_PID,
CSUM(QUOTE_NET_PID ,QUOTE_NET_PID ASC,SK_INSTANCE_ID_INT ASC ) AS   "CSUM",
CSUM(QUOTE_NET_PID ,QUOTE_NET_PID ASC,SK_INSTANCE_ID_INT ASC ) /QUOTE_TOTAL_PRICE AS CUM_PCT
FROM (
SELECT A.ORDER_NUMBER,A.QUOTE_NUMBER,A.PSG,A.PRODUCT_ID,A.PRODUCT_KEY,A.SK_INSTANCE_ID_INT,A.SERIAL_NUMBER,
A.QUOTE_NET_PID,B.QUOTE_TOTAL_PRICE
FROM (SELECT COALESCE(SERVICE_QUOTE_LINE.ORDER_NUMBER,-9999) AS ORDER_NUMBER,SERVICE_QUOTE_LINE.QUOTE_NUMBER AS QUOTE_NUMBER ,
SERVICE_QUOTE_LINE.SERVICE_TYPE AS PSG, SERVICE_QUOTE_LINE.PRODUCT_ID AS PRODUCT_ID,
PRDTS.ITEM_KEY AS PRODUCT_KEY,SERVICE_QUOTE_LINE.SK_INSTANCE_ID_INT,SERVICE_QUOTE_LINE.SERIAL_NUMBER,
CAST(SUM(SERVICE_QUOTE_LINE.LIST_QUOTE_PRICE) AS DECIMAL(27,16)) AS QUOTE_NET_PID
FROM $$STGDB.WI_QUOTE_EXTRACT_MERGE  SERVICE_QUOTE_LINE
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT PRDTS
ON PRDTS.BK_PRODUCT_ID = SERVICE_QUOTE_LINE.PRODUCT_ID
AND SERVICE_QUOTE_LINE.QUOTE_LINE_STATUS_CD IN ( 'CONVERTED' , 'QUOTE CONVERTED', 'QUOTE CONVERTED','PARTIAL QUOTE - ORDERED','QC')
AND SERVICE_QUOTE_LINE.LIST_QUOTE_PRICE <> 0 AND TRIM(SERVICE_QUOTE_LINE.QUOTE_NUMBER) <> '-999'
AND SERVICE_QUOTE_LINE.QUOTE_NUMBER IS NOT NULL
WHERE (SERVICE_QUOTE_LINE.QUOTE_NUMBER)  IN (SELECT QUOTE_NUMBER FROM $$STGDB.WI_DS_1_TO_M_QUOTE)
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6,7) A
INNER JOIN (SELECT SERVICE_QUOTE_LINE.QUOTE_NUMBER AS QUOTE_NUMBER, CAST(SUM((SERVICE_QUOTE_LINE.LIST_QUOTE_PRICE) ) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS QUOTE_TOTAL_PRICE
FROM $$STGDB.WI_QUOTE_EXTRACT_MERGE  SERVICE_QUOTE_LINE
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT PRDTS ON PRDTS.BK_PRODUCT_ID = SERVICE_QUOTE_LINE.PRODUCT_ID
AND SERVICE_QUOTE_LINE.QUOTE_LINE_STATUS_CD IN ( 'CONVERTED' , 'QUOTE CONVERTED', 'QUOTE CONVERTED','PARTIAL QUOTE - ORDERED','QC')
AND SERVICE_QUOTE_LINE.LIST_QUOTE_PRICE <> 0 AND TRIM(SERVICE_QUOTE_LINE.QUOTE_NUMBER) <> '-999'
AND SERVICE_QUOTE_LINE.QUOTE_NUMBER IS NOT NULL
WHERE (SERVICE_QUOTE_LINE.QUOTE_NUMBER) IN (SELECT QUOTE_NUMBER FROM $$STGDB.WI_DS_1_TO_M_QUOTE)
GROUP BY 1) B ON A.QUOTE_NUMBER=B.QUOTE_NUMBER 
) A GROUP BY QUOTE_NUMBER

SELECT
SERVICEORDERNUMBER_CURR  AS ORDER_NUMBER,
QUOTE_NUMBER AS QUOTE_NUMBER,
PRODUCT_SUBGROUP AS PRODUCT_SUBGROUP,
PRODUCT_ID AS PRODUCT_ID,
PRODUCT_KEY,
QUOTE_NET_PID,
ORDER_PSG_TOTAL_QUOTE_PRICE,
QUOTE_ALLOC_PCT
FROM $$STGDB.WI_RSTD_QUOTE_ALLCTN_1_TO_M

SELECT QUOTE_NUMBER, ORDER_NUMBER ,QUOTE_STATUS_CD ,CONTRACT_NUM ,TARGET_CONTRACT_NUM ,COVERAGE_START_DT ,COVERAGE_END_DT ,SERVICE_TYPE ,CLE_ID_RENEWED 
,SK_INSTANCE_ID_INT ,PRODUCT_ID ,SERIAL_NUMBER ,SHIPPED_DATE ,QUOTE_LINE_STATUS_CD,TOTAL_LIST_PRICE ,MAINTENANCE_LIST_PRICE ,LIST_QUOTE_PRICE ,ORDER_QUOTE_KEY ,SVCSKU_KEY 
,SYSTEM_SOURCE_QUOTES ,FISCAL_YEAR ,QUARTER_REF ,FISCAL_PERIOD_ID,'RQ'
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_QUOTE_SNAPSHOT A
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFM
ON RFM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT =A.FISCAL_PERIOD_ID
WHERE   FISCAL_PERIOD_ID IN  (SEL FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_SRVC_BKGS_CNTRL_MNTH)
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT DISTINCT BK_QUOTE_NUM FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_TECH_LINE_EDW_SUM_QUOTE B
WHERE B.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT <= A.FISCAL_PERIOD_ID
AND A.QUOTE_NUMBER = B.BK_QUOTE_NUM)
AND A.PRODUCT_ID <> 'UNKNOWN'

SELECT B.SERVICEORDERNUMBER AS SERVICEORDERNUMBER_PREV, A.SERVICEORDERNUMBER AS SERVICEORDERNUMBER_CURR, 
B.QUOTE_NUMBER, B.PSG, B.PRODUCT_ID,  B.PRODUCT_KEY, B.QUOTE_NET_PID
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SVC_PCT A 
INNER JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_SVC_LINE_PCT B
ON  A.QUOTE_NUMBER = B.QUOTE_NUMBER 
AND B.CUM_PCT BETWEEN A.MIN_RANGE AND A.MAX_RANGE

SELECT SERVICEORDERNUMBER,QUOTE_NUMBER, QUOTE_ORDER_BOOKING,TOTAL_BOOKINGS,BOOKINGS_PCT,CUM_PCT_AT_ORDER, CUM_PCT_AT_ORDER - BOOKINGS_PCT AS MIN_RANGE,
CASE WHEN (CUM_PCT_AT_ORDER-0.000001) >= 0.9999 THEN 1 WHEN CUM_PCT_AT_ORDER =0.000000 THEN CUM_PCT_AT_ORDER ELSE (CUM_PCT_AT_ORDER-0.000001) END AS MAX_RANGE
FROM(SELECT SERVICEORDERNUMBER, QUOTE_NUMBER, QUOTE_ORDER_BOOKING, BOOKINGS_PCT, TOTAL_BOOKINGS, CSUM(BOOKINGS_PCT, BOOKINGS_PCT ASC) AS CUM_PCT_AT_ORDER
FROM (SELECT A.SERVICEORDERNUMBER, A.QUOTE_NUMBER, A.QUOTE_ORDER_BOOKING,B.TOTAL_BOOKINGS,
COALESCE( (A.QUOTE_ORDER_BOOKING/NULLIFZERO (B.TOTAL_BOOKINGS) ),0) AS  BOOKINGS_PCT
FROM (SELECT A.SERVICEORDERNUMBER,B.QUOTE_NUMBER, SUM(ORDER_NET_PRICE) AS QUOTE_ORDER_BOOKING 
FROM $$STGDB.WI_RSTD_ORDER_ALLCTN A 
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DS_1_TO_M_QUOTE B 
ON A.SERVICEORDERNUMBER=B.SERVICEORDERNUMBER 
WHERE ORDER_NET_PRICE<>0 GROUP BY 1,2) A
INNER JOIN (SELECT QUOTE_NUMBER, SUM(TOTAL_BOOKINGS) AS TOTAL_BOOKINGS FROM 
(SELECT A.SERVICEORDERNUMBER,B.QUOTE_NUMBER, SUM(ORDER_NET_PRICE) AS TOTAL_BOOKINGS
FROM $$STGDB.WI_RSTD_ORDER_ALLCTN A 
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DS_1_TO_M_QUOTE B 
ON A.SERVICEORDERNUMBER=B.SERVICEORDERNUMBER
WHERE ORDER_NET_PRICE<>0 GROUP BY 1,2)  TOTAL GROUP BY 1
) B ON A.QUOTE_NUMBER=B.QUOTE_NUMBER AND TRIM(A.QUOTE_NUMBER)<>'-999'
) QUOTE_CUM GROUP BY QUOTE_NUMBER
) T

SELECT 
QUOTE_NET_PRICE.ORDER_NUM AS ORDER_NUMBER,
QUOTE_NET_PRICE.QUOTE_NUMBER AS QUOTE_NUMBER,
QUOTE_TOTAL_PRICE.PSG  AS PRODUCT_SUBGROUP,
QUOTE_NET_PRICE.PRODUCT_ID AS PRODUCT_ID,
QUOTE_NET_PRICE.PRODUCT_KEY,
QUOTE_NET_PRICE.QUOTE_NET_PID,
QUOTE_TOTAL_PRICE.ORDER_PSG_TOTAL_QUOTE_PRICE,
COALESCE(QUOTE_NET_PRICE.QUOTE_NET_PID / NULLIFZERO(QUOTE_TOTAL_PRICE.ORDER_PSG_TOTAL_QUOTE_PRICE)  ,1)  AS QUOTE_ALLOC_PCT
FROM(SELECT COALESCE(SERVICE_QUOTE_LINE.ORDER_NUMBER,-9999) AS ORDER_NUM,
SERVICE_QUOTE_LINE.SERVICE_TYPE AS PSG, CAST(SUM(SERVICE_QUOTE_LINE.LIST_QUOTE_PRICE) AS DECIMAL(27,16)) AS ORDER_PSG_TOTAL_QUOTE_PRICE
FROM $$STGDB.WI_QUOTE_EXTRACT_MERGE  SERVICE_QUOTE_LINE
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT PRDTS
ON PRDTS.BK_PRODUCT_ID = SERVICE_QUOTE_LINE.PRODUCT_ID
AND SERVICE_QUOTE_LINE.QUOTE_LINE_STATUS_CD  IN  ( 'CONVERTED' , 'QUOTE CONVERTED', 'QUOTE CONVERTED','PARTIAL QUOTE - ORDERED','QC')
AND SERVICE_QUOTE_LINE.LIST_QUOTE_PRICE <> 0
AND TRIM(SERVICE_QUOTE_LINE.QUOTE_NUMBER) <> '-999'
AND SERVICE_QUOTE_LINE.QUOTE_NUMBER IS NOT NULL
WHERE (SERVICE_QUOTE_LINE.QUOTE_NUMBER) NOT IN (SELECT QUOTE_NUMBER FROM $$STGDB.WI_DS_1_TO_M_QUOTE )
GROUP BY 1,2) QUOTE_TOTAL_PRICE
INNER JOIN (SELECT COALESCE(SERVICE_QUOTE_LINE.ORDER_NUMBER,-9999) AS ORDER_NUM,
SERVICE_QUOTE_LINE.QUOTE_NUMBER AS QUOTE_NUMBER ,
SERVICE_QUOTE_LINE.SERVICE_TYPE AS PSG,
SERVICE_QUOTE_LINE.PRODUCT_ID AS PRODUCT_ID,
PRDTS.ITEM_KEY AS PRODUCT_KEY,
CAST(SUM(SERVICE_QUOTE_LINE.LIST_QUOTE_PRICE) AS DECIMAL(27,16)) AS QUOTE_NET_PID
FROM $$STGDB.WI_QUOTE_EXTRACT_MERGE  SERVICE_QUOTE_LINE
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT PRDTS
ON PRDTS.BK_PRODUCT_ID = SERVICE_QUOTE_LINE.PRODUCT_ID
AND SERVICE_QUOTE_LINE.QUOTE_LINE_STATUS_CD  IN ( 'CONVERTED','QUOTE CONVERTED','QUOTE CONVERTED','PARTIAL QUOTE - ORDERED','QC')
AND SERVICE_QUOTE_LINE.LIST_QUOTE_PRICE <> 0
AND TRIM(SERVICE_QUOTE_LINE.QUOTE_NUMBER) <> '-999'
AND SERVICE_QUOTE_LINE.QUOTE_NUMBER IS NOT NULL
WHERE (SERVICE_QUOTE_LINE.QUOTE_NUMBER) NOT IN (SELECT QUOTE_NUMBER FROM $$STGDB.WI_DS_1_TO_M_QUOTE)
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5
) QUOTE_NET_PRICE
ON QUOTE_TOTAL_PRICE.ORDER_NUM = QUOTE_NET_PRICE.ORDER_NUM
AND COALESCE(QUOTE_TOTAL_PRICE.PSG,'X') = COALESCE(QUOTE_NET_PRICE.PSG,'X')

SELECT
B.SERVICEORDERNUMBER_CURR,
B.QUOTE_NUMBER,
B.PSG AS PRODUCT_SUBGROUP,
B.PRODUCT_ID,
B.PRODUCT_KEY,
B.QUOTE_NET_PID,
A.ORDER_PSG_TOTAL_QUOTE_PRICE,
COALESCE( B.QUOTE_NET_PID / NULLIFZERO(A.ORDER_PSG_TOTAL_QUOTE_PRICE),1) AS QUOTE_ALLOC_PCT
FROM (SELECT SERVICEORDERNUMBER_CURR ,PSG,CAST(SUM(QUOTE_NET_PID) AS DECIMAL(27,16)) AS ORDER_PSG_TOTAL_QUOTE_PRICE
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SVC_LINE_PCT_UPDATED GROUP BY 1,2) A
INNER JOIN (SELECT SERVICEORDERNUMBER_CURR,QUOTE_NUMBER,PSG,PRODUCT_ID,PRODUCT_KEY,CAST(SUM(QUOTE_NET_PID) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS QUOTE_NET_PID FROM $$STGDB.WI_SVC_LINE_PCT_UPDATED GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5) B
ON A.SERVICEORDERNUMBER_CURR=B.SERVICEORDERNUMBER_CURR AND COALESCE(A.PSG,'X')= COALESCE(B.PSG,'X')

SELECT DISTINCT QUOTE_NUMBER,SERVICEORDERNUMBER FROM $$STGDB.WI_RSTD_ORDER_ALLCTN 
WHERE QUOTE_NUMBER IN (SELECT   QUOTE_NUMBER  FROM (
SELECT SERVICEORDERNUMBER,QUOTE_NUMBER FROM $$STGDB.WI_RSTD_ORDER_ALLCTN  BKGS WHERE TRIM(QUOTE_NUMBER)<>'-999'
GROUP BY 1,2 ) A GROUP BY 1 HAVING COUNT(*)>3)

SELECT
B.ORDER_NUMBER,
B.QUOTE_NUMBER,
B.PRODUCT_SUBGROUP,
B.PRODUCT_ID,
B.PRODUCT_KEY,
B.QUOTE_NET_PID,
A.ORDER_PSG_TOTAL_QUOTE_PRICE,
COALESCE( B.QUOTE_NET_PID / NULLIFZERO(A.ORDER_PSG_TOTAL_QUOTE_PRICE),1) AS QUOTE_ALLOC_PCT
FROM (SELECT ORDER_NUMBER ,PRODUCT_SUBGROUP,CAST(SUM(QUOTE_NET_PID) AS DECIMAL(27,16)) AS ORDER_PSG_TOTAL_QUOTE_PRICE
FROM  $$STGDB.WI_DS_QUOTE
GROUP BY 1,2) A
INNER JOIN (
SELECT ORDER_NUMBER,QUOTE_NUMBER,PRODUCT_SUBGROUP,PRODUCT_ID,PRODUCT_KEY,CAST(SUM(QUOTE_NET_PID ) AS DECIMAL(27,16)) AS QUOTE_NET_PID
FROM $$STGDB.WI_DS_QUOTE GROUP BY  1,2,3,4,5
) B
ON A.ORDER_NUMBER=B.ORDER_NUMBER 
AND COALESCE(A.PRODUCT_SUBGROUP,'X')=COALESCE(B.PRODUCT_SUBGROUP,'X')
